bird.name: Musician wren
bird.summary: The musician wren or organ wren (Cyphorhinus arada) is a species of wren named for its elaborate song. It is native to the Amazon rainfores…

locations.name: 亞馬遜雨林
locations.summary: 亞馬遜雨林（葡萄牙語：Amazônia、西班牙語：Amazonia），又稱亞馬遜河雨林，位於南美洲亞馬遜盆地的熱帶雨林，佔地僅存約500萬平方公里，使這片雨林生機盎然的就是亞馬遜河。雨林橫越了8個國家：巴西（佔森林60%面積）、哥倫比亞、…

locations.name: Várzea forest
locations.summary: A várzea forest is a seasonal floodplain forest inundated by whitewater rivers that occurs in the Amazon biome.

relations.subject: Musician wren
relations.evidence: modulator, eastern Peru, northern Bolivia, and western Brazil south of the Amazon as far east as Rio Madeira The musician wren generally inhabits the lower levels of humid forest; in Brazil it is also found in várzea
